docs.name: Mac
docs.notes: Bully out of fear; tire iron. Works car to car demanding people 'share' food and water. Not (yet) a monster — scared and bullying. If he lives, a recurring wildcard: bully, rival, or unlikely ally depending on how the players treated him.

docs.name: Sarah
docs.notes: The heart of Session 1. Almost certainly lost — but how the players respond defines the table's tone for the whole campaign. Can be introduced at the jam, the rest area, or on the hike (Sarah, Anywhere).

docs.name: Leo
docs.role: Sarah's feverish son → the first true horror
docs.statBlock: Fever victim → Waker (use Freshly Turned block)
docs.notes: A boy sweating through a 104° fever. His death → reanimation around Hour 5 is the campaign's first true horror. Use the Wakers stat block when he turns.

docs.name: The Paramedic
docs.role: Bitten, doomed, but useful and willing
docs.wants: To do some good with the time left.
docs.notes: Sprints from a trapped ambulance to do CPR on Leo; gets bitten pulling Leo off Sarah. Skilled, willing, dying — a heartbreaking traveling companion who knows their clock is ticking.

docs.name: Radio Rick
docs.role: Prepper, ham operator, intel source, 'build a life' refuge
docs.wants: To keep his people alive and not be alone out here.
docs.notes: Chino Valley prepper on several acres — well, chickens, horses, fuel, food stores, defensible ground. Paranoid, prickly, deeply decent to people who pull their weight. Distrusts the Guard on principle (and turns out right). The campaign's off-grid intel source and its 'build a life' refuge.

docs.name: Captain Reyes
docs.wants: To save as many as the orders allow.
docs.notes: Commands the Deep Well Ranch safe zone ('Operation Hearthstone'). Doing visibly impossible math behind her eyes. Authority that can shelter you, manage you, and — at the end — write you off when Ashfall executes. The safe zone is the threat in a uniform.

docs.name: Dr. Elena Rosas
docs.role: Vet in Dewey, reluctant leader of armed ranchers
docs.wants: To protect the people already inside her walls.
docs.notes: Exhausted competence; reluctant leader; trades care for trust earned. A possible long-term ally and a source of hard truths about the infection. Holds the Dewey vet clinic (medicine when the hospitals burn).

docs.name: The Dewey Ranchers
docs.notes: A handful of scared, capable people with deer rifles and a lot to protect. Defenders, not villains — people doing the math on every stranger at the door.
